name: Pumpkin Puff Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs in a small mixing bowl on high speed for 5 minutes or until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Pour batter by tablespoons onto a medium-hot griddle.
4. Bake until puffed and bubbles begin to break.
5. Turn and bake the other side until golden brown.
6. Makes about five dozen, 2-inch pancakes. I bet these smell good too!
